since_last: 34% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +0.84%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +1.47% · Gold +0.08% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 34% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +0.84%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +0.84%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.68%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DV is the standout at +5.32%
cards.body: Leaders: DV +5.32%, ROK +4.72%, INTC +3.94%, MU +3.73%, SMCI +3.07%. Laggards: DLR -4.33%, SPCX -4.15%, SAP -3.15%, BABA -1.75%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.15% at $177.32
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
